author: semsevens
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Archive remote URLs from markdown locally and serve from local cache on render.

manifest.description: Archive remote URLs from markdown locally and serve from local cache on render.

name: Archive Redirect

releases.author: semsevens
releases.description:
Lint fixes per ObsidianReviewBot.

- `console.log` -> `console.debug` in batch scan progress
- Sentence-case fixes for UI text: 'markdown' -> 'Markdown' in two setting descriptions
- Drop placeholder example text from Included paths textarea (rule mis-cases path-like text)

No behavioural changes; safe to upgrade from 0.4.0.

releases.author: semsevens
releases.description: Live Preview + Source mode coverage. **What's new in 0.4.0** - CM6 ViewPlugin hook mirrors Reading-mode interception - Default Live Preview editing now serves cached `/
releases.name: v0.4.0
